specific_question: By Q1 2026, will Elexion Automotive’s digital engineering team integrate digital twin dashboards to monitor EV battery performance in real time?
answer: Yes. An internal project brief dated October 1, 2025 confirms that Elexion’s digital engineering team plans to deploy digital twin dashboards to track EV battery health, charge cycles, and temperature patterns in real time by January 1, 2026.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
